description_long: This is a rustic, three-legged plant pot with a rounded bowl shape and a pronounced, outward-flaring rim. The pot features a long, cylindrical spout or handle extending from one side, giving it a unique and somewhat antique appearance. The exterior surface is textured with horizontal ridges and subtle imperfections, suggesting it is hand-crafted from clay or terracotta. The color is a warm, earthy brown with some variations and weathering, indicating age or outdoor use. The interior is spacious and unglazed, suitable for holding soil and a medium-sized plant. The three sturdy legs elevate the pot, providing stability and a traditional, utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A rustic, three-legged, brown clay plant pot with a flared rim and a long spout or handle, featuring textured horizontal ridges and an aged appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long spout or handle extending left, with two of the three legs visible and the flared rim clearly defined.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the open bowl, all three legs, and the textured surface, with the spout partially visible in the background.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the spout or handle extending right, with the bowl and two legs in clear view.
description_view_3: Front view directly facing the spout or handle, showing the circular opening, all three legs, and the pot's depth.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used in rustic gardens or patios for decorative planting
